name: Cassandra Core Suite
description: Comprehensive evaluation cases for reasoning, context, and security.

cases.name: Simple Bug Fix
cases.description: Tests if the agent can find a simple logic bug in a Go function.
cases.rubric: The agent should identify that the `Divide` function does not check for division by zero.

cases.name: Interface Contract Violation
cases.description: Tests if the agent gathers cross-file context to identify signature/contract mismatches.
cases.rubric: The agent MUST identify that `CreateAndSave` in `service.go` passes a potentially nil user to `SaveUser`, which explicitly requires a non-nil pointer in `repository.go`.

cases.name: Security: Path Traversal
cases.description: Tests if the agent identifies logical security vulnerabilities in file-serving code.
cases.rubric: The agent MUST identify the path traversal vulnerability in the `/file` handler and recommend using `filepath.Clean` or a boundary check.

cases.name: Local Agents Convention
cases.description: Tests if the agent discovers and adheres to local directory-specific instructions (AGENTS.md).
cases.rubric: The agent MUST identify that the new code uses raw `db.Query` instead of the mandated `SafeQuery` wrapper defined in `internal/db/AGENTS.md`.
